raw.message: Hunt For Treasure In Thrilling Storage Auctions And Be Strategic To Maximize Your Wins!

hook.summary: A storage unit door opens to reveal items and a bidding war starts.
hook.visual_action: Garage door opens, revealing a storage unit; a hand clicks 'BID' as prices rise.
hook.voiceover_transcript: All right, let's do this. Who's gonna make it? Here. Now. Here.

scene_flow: Garage door opens to reveal a storage unit with a large covered object.
A bidding war ensues with the player clicking 'BID' against other characters.
The player wins the auction, and a shower of gold coins appears.
The tarp is lifted to reveal a damaged truck, resulting in a 'FAIL' message.
Final end card with the game logo and 'PLAY NOW' call to action.
audience_proxy: Men 25-45 who enjoy the thrill of auctions and casual strategy games.
